span.p: Informational — AI Overviews and answer engines most likely

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Transactional — users in buy or do mode

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the primary goal classic search rank, AI citation, or both?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Classic SEO: keyword in title, H1, meta description, clean URL, canonical, internal links, page speed

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: AEO: FAQ schema, answer-ready headings as questions, E-E-A-T signals, entity markup, direct answer in first paragraph

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Is the query type informational e.g. how-to or what-is, or transactional e.g. buy or download?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Prioritize AEO structure: direct answer first, FAQ schema, question headings; classic SEO fundamentals still apply

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Prioritize classic SEO: conversion page structure, fast LCP, schema for product/event/review; AEO signals are secondary
